title: she.rs uses WolfHsmError::Ffi for pre-FFI block-size validation
description: validate_she_block_size returns WolfHsmError::Ffi for invalid block size, but no FFI call has been made at that point. BadArgs is the correct variant. Callers matching on Ffi for diagnostics get misleading output. Every new SHE function reusing this helper will propagate the wrong variant.
